human_actions_pending.action: Re-verify UAT test 2 (Registration Flow) after fixes, then proceed to test 3 (Login Flow)
human_actions_pending.context: Two gaps found and fixed during test 2: (1) auth page layout broken due to wrong Bootstrap CDN integrity hash in auth/base.html (layouts now load correctly), (2) password policy strengthened from 2-of-4 types to 4-of-4 (uppercase+lowercase+digit+symbol required). User saw register page but design was broken; fixes applied but not re-verified yet. Server running at http://localhost:5000.

decisions.decision: Fixed config.py DB URI from sqlite:///instance/app.db to sqlite:///app.db
decisions.rationale: Flask-SQLAlchemy 3.x prepends instance_path to relative DB paths, causing doubled instance/instance/ path

decisions.decision: Fixed auth/base.html Bootstrap CDN integrity hashes (CSS+JS) to match actual cdn.jsdelivr.net content
decisions.rationale: Wrong integrity hashes caused browser to refuse loading Bootstrap CSS, making auth pages appear unstyled/broken

decisions.decision: Strengthened password policy from 2-of-4 to 4-of-4 character types
decisions.rationale: User expected all 4 types (uppercase, lowercase, digit, symbol) rather than only 2-of-4

next_action: Restart Flask server (python run.py), re-verify UAT test 2 (Registration Flow) at /auth/register — confirm page is centered/styled and strong password (Passw0rd!) accepted, weak password (password1) rejected. Then proceed to test 3 (Login Flow).
context_notes: Phase 2 auth system fully built (5/5 plans). UAT 2/10 tests passed (test 1 cold start, test 2 registration flow identified but gaps fixed). Test 3 (Login Flow) is next. Server runs on port 5000 with debug mode.
